use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF HEAVY MENSTRUAL BLEEDING ASSOCIATED WITH UTERINE LEIOMYOMAS (FIBROIDS) IN PREMENOPAUSAL WOMEN
MANAGEMENT OF MODERATE TO SEVERE PAIN ASSOCIATED WITH ENDOMETRIOSIS

indications.text:
1.1 Heavy Menstrual Bleeding Associated with Uterine Leiomyomas
MYFEMBREE is indicated for the management of heavy menstrual bleeding associated with
uterine leiomyomas (fibroids) in premenopausal women.
